hero.title: The Ultimate Discord Productivity Bot
hero.subtitle: Activity tracking, economy, leaderboards, productivity tools, and so much more. The all-in-one solution every Discord community needs.

features.title: Everything Your Server Needs
features.subtitle: Packed with features to keep your community engaged and productive.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: Track daily, weekly, monthly and all-time chat and voice activity. Beautiful graphical summaries to analyze progress.

leaderboards.title: Leaderboards
leaderboards.description: Compare progress across members and servers. Reset to create your own server seasons.

voiceRooms.title: Private Voice Rooms
voiceRooms.description: Create private voice rooms and invite friends. Admins can control webcam usage for safety.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro Timers
pomodoro.description: Built-in focus timers with customizable work and break intervals to boost productivity.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.description: Customizable member profiles with achievements, stats, and collectible skins.

economy.title: Economy
economy.description: Earn coins through activity, spend in the role shop, and reward your most active members.

badges.title: Activity Badges
badges.description: Assign roles based on chat and voice activity. Fully customizable ranks, intervals, and colors.

todos.title: To-Do & Reminders
todos.description: Create task lists, set weekly and monthly goals, and stay accountable with reminders.

schedule.title: Scheduled Sessions
schedule.description: Schedule study sessions members can attend. Missing sessions costs a bonus, building accountability.

step1.title: Add to Discord
step1.description: Click the invite link to add Leo to your server.

step2.title: Configure
step2.description: Set up channels, roles, and preferences from the dashboard.

step3.title: Watch Your Server Thrive
step3.description: Members start tracking activity and engaging with your community.

finalCta.title: Ready to Boost Your Server?
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of communities already using LionBot.
